hooks.command: if [ -f "$HOME/.codex/superpowers-optimized/hooks/codex/session-start-adapter.js" ]; then node "$HOME/.codex/superpowers-optimized/hooks/codex/session-start-adapter.js"; elif [ -f "$HOME/.codex/superpowers/hooks/codex/session-start-adapter.js" ]; then node "$HOME/.codex/superpowers/hooks/codex/session-start-adapter.js"; else echo '{}'; fi

if [ -f "$HOME/.codex/superpowers-optimized/hooks/skill-activator.js" ]; then node "$HOME/.codex/superpowers-optimized/hooks/skill-activator.js"; elif [ -f "$HOME/.codex/superpowers/hooks/skill-activator.js" ]; then node "$HOME/.codex/superpowers/hooks/skill-activator.js"; else echo '{}'; fi

if [ -f "$HOME/.codex/superpowers-optimized/hooks/codex/stop-adapter.js" ]; then node "$HOME/.codex/superpowers-optimized/hooks/codex/stop-adapter.js"; elif [ -f "$HOME/.codex/superpowers/hooks/codex/stop-adapter.js" ]; then node "$HOME/.codex/superpowers/hooks/codex/stop-adapter.js"; else echo '{}'; fi

if [ -f "$HOME/.codex/superpowers-optimized/hooks/codex/pretool-bash-adapter.js" ]; then node "$HOME/.codex/superpowers-optimized/hooks/codex/pretool-bash-adapter.js"; elif [ -f "$HOME/.codex/superpowers/hooks/codex/pretool-bash-adapter.js" ]; then node "$HOME/.codex/superpowers/hooks/codex/pretool-bash-adapter.js"; else echo '{}'; fi
